brief_justification: Wrong answer (relic's shelf instead of camp table) but reasoning approach of tracking object movements was sound; Goes one level beyond surface by tracing the notebook through multiple locations; Implicit self-monitoring in methodically stepping through the story but no reflection on whether Eli witnessed the move; Mentions tracing but doesn't verify whether Eli had knowledge of Emma's action; Presents conclusion confidently without acknowledging the key uncertainty about Eli's awareness; Acknowledges the initial camp table location as an alternative but dismisses it without considering Eli's perspective; Shows clear derivation steps with numbered location tracking but misses the critical theory-of-mind analysis
